mapper.sql:
WITH T_INVN AS ( SELECT A.CTKEY , A.OWKEY , A.ICKEY , SUM(A.AVQTY) AS AVQTY , SUM(A.NAVQTY) AS NAVQTY , A.AVZNYN FROM ( SELECT IVLC.CTKEY , IVLC.OWKEY , IVLC.ICKEY , CASE ZN.ZNTYPECD WHEN '10' THEN IVLC.TOTQTY ELSE 0 END AS AVQTY , CASE ZN.ZNTYPECD WHEN '10' THEN 0 ELSE IVLC.TOTQTY END AS NAVQTY , CASE ZN.ZNTYPECD WHEN '10' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS AVZNYN FROM TWORK_INFO_IVATXLC IVLC INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_IVAT IV ON IV.CTKEY = IVLC.CTKEY AND IV.OWKEY = IVLC.OWKEY AND IV.ICKEY = IVLC.ICKEY AND IV.IVATKEY = IVLC.IVATKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_LC LC ON LC.CTKEY = IVLC.CTKEY AND LC.LCKEY = IVLC.LCKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_ZN ZN ON ZN.CTKEY = IVLC.CTKEY AND ZN.ZNKEY = LC.ZNKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_AR AR ON AR.CTKEY = IVLC.CTKEY AND AR.ZNKEY = LC.ZNKEY AND AR.ARKEY = LC.ARKEY WHERE IVLC.TOTQTY > 0 ) A GROUP BY A.CTKEY , A.OWKEY , A.ICKEY , A.AVZNYN )
SELECT '0' AS CHK , ASTR.CTKEY /* 센터코드 */ , CT.CTNM /* 센터명 */ , ASTR.OWKEY /* 화주코드 */ , OW.OWNM /* 화주명 */ , ASTR.BFCHGICKEY AS ICKEY /* 변경전 상품코드 */ , ASTR.BFCHGICKEY /* 변경전 상품코드 */ , BFIC.ICNM AS BFCHGICNM /* 변경전 상품명 */ , ASTR.AFCHGICKEY /* 변경후 상품코드 */ , AFIC.ICNM AS AFCHGICNM /* 변경후 상품명 */ , ASTR.WKISTDATE /* 작업지시일 */ , ASTR.IVCNVRSNYN /* 재고전환 여부 */ , ASTR.LBLPRYN /* 라벨출력 여부 */ , COALESCE(AVINVN.AVQTY, 0) AS AVQTY /* 가용재고 */ , COALESCE(NAVINVN.NAVQTY, 0) AS NAVQTY /* 불용재고 */ , ASTR.INSERTDATE /* 등록일자 */ , ASTR.INSERTURKEY /* 등록자 */ , ASTR.UPDATEDATE /* 수정일자 */ , ASTR.UPDATEURKEY /* 수정자 */ FROM TWORK_INFO_ASRT_RENEW ASTR INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CT CT ON CT.CTKEY = ASTR.CTKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_OW OW ON OW.OWKEY = ASTR.OWKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC BFIC ON BFIC.CTKEY = ASTR.CTKEY AND BFIC.OWKEY = ASTR.OWKEY AND BFIC.ICKEY = ASTR.BFCHGICKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC AFIC ON AFIC.CTKEY = ASTR.CTKEY AND AFIC.OWKEY = ASTR.OWKEY AND AFIC.ICKEY = ASTR.AFCHGICKEY LEFT JOIN T_INVN AVINVN ON AVINVN.CTKEY = ASTR.CTKEY AND AVINVN.OWKEY = ASTR.OWKEY AND AVINVN.ICKEY = ASTR.BFCHGICKEY AND AVINVN.AVZNYN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN T_INVN NAVINVN ON NAVINVN.CTKEY = ASTR.CTKEY AND NAVINVN.OWKEY = ASTR.OWKEY AND NAVINVN.ICKEY = ASTR.BFCHGICKEY AND NAVINVN.AVZNYN = 'N'
AND ASTR.OWKEY = COALESCE(#{owkey}, #{sowkey})
AND #{SEARCH_CONDITION}
mapper.select:
/* wms-inventory-asrtrenewal-sql-oracle.xml - selectItemInvnList */ SELECT '0' AS CHK , #{bfchgickey} AS BFCHGICKEY /* 변경 전 상품코드 */ , #{afchgickey} AS AFCHGICKEY /* 변경 후 상품코드 */ , IVLC.CTKEY /* 센터코드 */ , IVLC.OWKEY /* 화주코드 */ , OW.OWNM /* 화주명 */ , LC.ZNKEY /* 존코드 */ , ZN.ZNNM /* 존명 */ , LC.ARKEY /* 구역코드 */ , AR.ARNM /* 구역명 */ , IVLC.LCKEY /* 로케이션 코드 */ , IVLC.IVSERIALNO , IVLC.ICKEY /* 상품코드 */ , IC.ICNM /* 상품명 */ , ICBC.BARCODE /* 상품바코드 */ , IVLC.IVATKEY /* 재고속성코드 */ , IV.TCDCDIVCD /* TCDC구분코드 */ , IV.PRDCTDATE /* 생산일시 */ , IV.EXPDATE /* 유통기한 */ , IV.EXPIMMTDATE /* 유통기한임박일시 */ , IV.OBIMPSDATE /* 출고불가일시 */ , IV.ICTMPRDIVCD /* 상품온도구분코드 */ , IV.IVATSTATUSCD /* 재고 속성 상태 코드 */ , IVLC.TOTQTY /* 총수량 */ , IVLC.AVQTY /* 가용수량 */ , IVLC.ALQTY /* 할당수량 */ , IVLC.HOLDQTY /* 보류수량 */ , ZN.ZNTYPECD FROM TWORK_INFO_IVATXLC IVLC INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CT CT ON CT.CTKEY = IVLC.CTKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_OW OW ON OW.OWKEY = IVLC.OWKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC IC ON IC.CTKEY = IVLC.CTKEY AND IC.OWKEY = IVLC.OWKEY AND IC.ICKEY = IVLC.ICKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_IVAT IV ON IV.CTKEY = IVLC.CTKEY AND IV.OWKEY = IVLC.OWKEY AND IV.ICKEY = IVLC.ICKEY AND IV.IVATKEY = IVLC.IVATKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_LC LC ON LC.CTKEY = IVLC.CTKEY AND LC.LCKEY = IVLC.LCKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_ZN ZN ON ZN.CTKEY = LC.CTKEY AND ZN.ZNKEY = LC.ZNKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_AR AR ON AR.CTKEY = LC.CTKEY AND AR.ZNKEY = LC.ZNKEY AND AR.ARKEY = LC.ARKEY LEFT JOIN TWORK_MST_ICBARCODE ICBC ON ICBC.CTKEY = IVLC.CTKEY AND ICBC.OWKEY = IVLC.OWKEY AND ICBC.ICKEY = IVLC.ICKEY AND ICBC.UOM = 'EA' AND ICBC.USEYN = 'Y'
AND IVLC.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND IVLC.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND ( IVLC.ICKEY = #{ickey} OR IVLC.ICKEY = #{afchgickey} ) AND IVLC.TOTQTY > 0

/* wms-inventory-asrtrenewal-sql-oracle.xml - selectItemInvnList */ SELECT '0' AS CHK , #{bfchgickey} AS BFCHGICKEY /* 변경 전 상품코드 */ , #{afchgickey} AS AFCHGICKEY /* 변경 후 상품코드 */ , IVLC.CTKEY /* 센터코드 */ , IVLC.OWKEY /* 화주코드 */ , OW.OWNM /* 화주명 */ , LC.ZNKEY /* 존코드 */ , ZN.ZNNM /* 존명 */ , LC.ARKEY /* 구역코드 */ , AR.ARNM /* 구역명 */ , IVLC.LCKEY /* 로케이션 코드 */ , IVLC.IVSERIALNO , IVLC.ICKEY /* 상품코드 */ , IC.ICNM /* 상품명 */ , ICBC.BARCODE /* 상품바코드 */ , IVLC.IVATKEY /* 재고속성코드 */ , IV.TCDCDIVCD /* TCDC구분코드 */ , IV.PRDCTDATE /* 생산일시 */ , IV.EXPDATE /* 유통기한 */ , IV.EXPIMMTDATE /* 유통기한임박일시 */ , IV.OBIMPSDATE /* 출고불가일시 */ , IV.ICTMPRDIVCD /* 상품온도구분코드 */ , IV.IVATSTATUSCD /* 재고 속성 상태 코드 */ , IVLC.TOTQTY /* 총수량 */ , IVLC.AVQTY /* 가용수량 */ , IVLC.ALQTY /* 할당수량 */ , IVLC.HOLDQTY /* 보류수량 */ , ZN.ZNTYPECD FROM TWORK_INFO_IVATXLC IVLC INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CT CT ON CT.CTKEY = IVLC.CTKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_OW OW ON OW.OWKEY = IVLC.OWKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC IC ON IC.CTKEY = IVLC.CTKEY AND IC.OWKEY = IVLC.OWKEY AND IC.ICKEY = IVLC.ICKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_IVAT IV ON IV.CTKEY = IVLC.CTKEY AND IV.OWKEY = IVLC.OWKEY AND IV.ICKEY = IVLC.ICKEY AND IV.IVATKEY = IVLC.IVATKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_LC LC ON LC.CTKEY = IVLC.CTKEY AND LC.LCKEY = IVLC.LCKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_ZN ZN ON ZN.CTKEY = LC.CTKEY AND ZN.ZNKEY = LC.ZNKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_AR AR ON AR.CTKEY = LC.CTKEY AND AR.ZNKEY = LC.ZNKEY AND AR.ARKEY = LC.ARKEY LEFT JOIN TWORK_MST_ICBARCODE ICBC ON ICBC.CTKEY = IVLC.CTKEY AND ICBC.OWKEY = IVLC.OWKEY AND ICBC.ICKEY = IVLC.ICKEY AND ICBC.UOM = 'EA' AND ICBC.USEYN = 'Y'
AND IVLC.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND IVLC.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND IVLC.ICKEY = #{bfchgickey} AND IVLC.LCKEY = #{lckey} AND IVLC.IVATKEY = #{ivatkey} AND IVLC.IVSERIALNO = #{ivserialno} AND IVLC.TOTQTY > 0
